hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select FA.ID_LOG_ALERTA AS "idLogAlerta", FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AS "idReglaNegocio", FA.ID_FUENTE_ALERTA AS "idFuenteAlerta", RN.NOMBRE AS "nombre", FA.CREACION_FECHA as "creacionFecha", FA.FLG_ALERTA_GENERADA AS "flgEnviado", (SELECT count(*) "TOTAL" FROM SGALERTASSYS.LOG_DETALLE LD WHERE LD.ID_LOG_ALERTA = FA.ID_LOG_ALERTA) as "cantidadRegistros", FA.ESTADO AS "estado" FROM SGALERTASSYS.LOG_ALERTA FA with (nolock) LEFT JOIN SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) ON FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO WHERE FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AND FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio,FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND cast(FA.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date) ORDER BY FA.ID_LOG_ALERTA desc

select count(1) FROM SGALERTASSYS.LOG_ALERTA FA with (nolock), SGALERTASSYS.REGLA_NEGOCIO RN with (nolock) WHERE FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = RN.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO AND FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO = ISNULL(:idreglanegocio,FA.ID_REGLA_NEGOCIO) AND cast(FA.CREACION_FECHA as date) BETWEEN cast(:fechaPreparacionInicio as date) AND cast(:fechaPreparacionFin as date)

SELECT DET.NRO_REGISTRO AS "nroRegistro", DET.NOMBRE_CAMPO AS "campoNombre", DET.VALOR AS "campoValor" FROM SGALERTASSYS.LOG_DETALLE DET with (nolock) WHERE DET.ID_LOG_ALERTA = :id_log_alerta ORDER BY DET.NRO_REGISTRO ASC, DET.NOMBRE_CAMPO
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM SGALERTASSYS.LOG_DETALLE DET with (nolock) WHERE DET.ID_LOG_ALERTA = :id_log_alerta

SELECT RN.flg_log_generar_alerta AS "flgLogGenerarAlerta", DET.id_regla_negocio AS "idReglaNegocio", (SELECT Count(1) FROM sgalertassys.regla_negocio_programacion PRO WITH (nolock) WHERE PRO.id_regla_negocio = DET.id_regla_negocio AND PRO.estado = 'A' AND PRO.id_tipo_programacion = 'COR') AS "cantidadProgramacionCorreo" FROM (SELECT ALE.id_regla_negocio FROM sgalertassys.log_alerta ALE WITH (nolock) WHERE ALE.flg_alerta_generada = 'N' GROUP BY ALE.id_regla_negocio) DET INNER JOIN sgalertassys.regla_negocio RN WITH (nolock) ON DET.id_regla_negocio = RN.id_regla_negocio WHERE RN.ESTADO='A'

SELECT ADI.NRO_REGISTRO AS "nroRegistro", ADI.NOMBRE_CAMPO AS "campoNombre", ADI.VALOR AS "campoValor" FROM SGALERTASSYS.LOG_ADICIONAL ADI with (nolock) WHERE ADI.ID_LOG_ALERTA = :id_log_alerta ORDER BY ADI.NRO_REGISTRO ASC
SELECT count(*) FROM SGALERTASSYS.LOG_ADICIONAL ADI with (nolock) WHERE ADI.ID_LOG_ALERTA = :id_log_alerta
